patterns.pattern: ^(You) mix together the ingredients of the caustic chemical and fling it at (.+)'s shield, watching as it is consumed\.$
^(\w+) mixes together a few ingredients and flings the mixture at (.+)'s shield, watching as it is consumed.$
^Directing the energy of copper, (you) send myriad russet streams towards (.+), shattering \w+ shield\.$
^(\w+) sends myriad russet streams towards (.+), shattering \w+ shield\.$
^Directing the energy of copper, (you) send myriad russet streams towards (.+), which whip around \w+ ineffectually\.$
^Directing the energy of iron, (you) engulf (.+)'s body with ashen flames, which burn \w+ skin with their frigid touch\.$
^(Ashen) flames engulf (.+)'s body, burning \w+ skin with their frigid touch\.$
